/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import sympy
print(sympy.__version__)
from sympy import *
x,y,z,n = symbols('x y z n')
cs1 = solveset_real(Abs(x)-y,x)
print('cs1=', cs1)
print('cs1 sub=', cs1.subs(y,Rational(1,3)))
im = imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
cs2=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),im)
print('im=',im)
print('cs2=',cs2)
for what, got in [
 ('subs rat', cs2.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('xrep rat', cs2.xreplace({y:Rational(1,3)})),
 ('sim rat', cs2.subs({y:Rational(1,3)}, simultaneous=True)),
 ('im subs rat',im.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('im subs z',im.subs(y,z)),
]: print(what,'=',got, '| repr:',repr(got))
PY"

import sympy
from sympy import *
from sympy.solvers.solveset import solveset_real
x,y,z,n = symbols('x y z n')
cs1 = solveset_real(Abs(x)-y,x)
print('version=',sympy.__version__)
print('cs1=', cs1)
print('cs1 sub=', cs1.subs(y,Rational(1,3)))
im = imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
cs2=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),im)
print('im=',im)
print('cs2=',cs2)
for what, got in [
 ('subs rat', cs2.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('xrep rat', cs2.xreplace({y:Rational(1,3)})),
 ('sim rat', cs2.subs({y:Rational(1,3)}, simultaneous=True)),
 ('im subs rat',im.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('im subs z',im.subs(y,z)),
]: print(what,'=',got, '| srepr:',srepr(got))
PY"

x,y,z,n = symbols('x y z n')
cs1 = solveset_real(Abs(x)-y,x)
print('version=',sympy.__version__)
print('cs1=', cs1)
print('cs1 sub=', cs1.subs(y,Rational(1,3)))
im = imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)),S.Integers)
cs2=ConditionSet(x,Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),im)
print('im=',im)
print('cs2=',cs2)
for what, got in [
 ('subs rat', cs2.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('xrep rat', cs2.xreplace({y:Rational(1,3)})),
 ('sim rat', cs2.subs({y:Rational(1,3)}, simultaneous=True)),
 ('im subs rat',im.subs(y,Rational(1,3))),
 ('im subs z',im.subs(y,z)),
]: print(what,'=',got, '| srepr:',srepr(got))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n=symbols('x y n')
img1=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)), S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x, Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),img1)
new=S.One/3
cond=c.condition.subs(y,new)
base=c.base_set.subs(y,new)
out=c.subs(y,new)
print('c:', repr(c), c.args)
print('cond:', repr(cond), cond, cond is S.true)
print('base:', repr(base), base, base.args)
print('out:', repr(out), out)
print('out.args:', out.args)
print('out.sym:', repr(out.sym), type(out.sym))
print('out.condition:', repr(out.condition))
print('out.base:', repr(out.base_set))
cs=ConditionSet(new, Contains(new,base), base)
print('explicit equal?', out==cs, repr(cs))
t=Dummy('lambda')
cr=Contains(new,base).xreplace({new:t})
print('constructor guard replacement:', repr(cr))
print('free_symbols:', cr.free_symbols)
print('base xreplace side effect:', repr(base.xreplace({new:t})))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
x,y,n=symbols('x y n')
img1=imageset(Lambda(n,2*n*pi+asin(y)), S.Integers)
c=ConditionSet(x, Contains(y,Interval(-1,1)),img1)
new=S.One/3
cond=c.condition.subs(y,new)
base=c.base_set.subs(y,new)
out=c.subs(y,new)
print('c:', repr(c), c.args)
print('cond:', repr(cond), cond, cond is S.true)
print('base:', repr(base), base, base.args)
print('out:', repr(out), out)
print('out.args:', out.args)
print('out.sym:', repr(out.sym), type(out.sym))
print('out.condition:', repr(out.condition))
print('out.base:', repr(out.base_set))
cs=ConditionSet(new, Contains(new,base), base)
print('explicit equal?', out==cs, repr(cs))
t=Dummy('lambda')
cr=Contains(new,base).xreplace({new:t})
print('constructor guard replacement:', repr(cr))
print('free_symbols:', cr.free_symbols)
print('base xreplace side effect:', repr(base.xreplace({new:t})))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Symbol, S, ConditionSet, Contains, Interval, Lambda, asin, imageset, pi, oo
x, y = map(Symbol, 'xy')
n = Symbol('n', negative=True)
p = Symbol('p', positive=True)
for base in (Interval(0, oo), Interval(-oo, 0)):
    c = ConditionSet(n, n < x, base)
    print('input', repr(c))
    print('cond after x->p:', repr(c.condition.subs(x, p)))
    print('base after x->p:', repr(c.base_set.subs(x, p)))
    print('result:', repr(c.subs(x, p)))
k = Symbol('k')
img1 = imageset(Lambda(k, 2*k*pi + asin(y)), S.Integers)
img2 = imageset(Lambda(k, 2*k*pi + asin(S.One/3)), S.Integers)
c = ConditionSet(x, Contains(y, Interval(-1,1)), img1)
r = c.subs(y, S.One/3)
print('image input:', repr(c))
print('image post-cond:', repr(c.condition.subs(y, S.One/3)))
print('image post-base:', repr(c.base_set.subs(y, S.One/3)))
print('image result:', repr(r))
print('expected:', repr(img2), 'dummy_eq:', r.dummy_eq(img2))
PY"

from sympy import Symbol, S, ConditionSet, Contains, Interval, Lambda, asin, imageset, pi, oo
x, y = map(Symbol, 'xy')
n = Symbol('n', negative=True)
p = Symbol('p', positive=True)
for base in (Interval(0, oo), Interval(-oo, 0)):
    c = ConditionSet(n, n < x, base)
    print('input', repr(c))
    print('cond after x->p:', repr(c.condition.subs(x, p)))
    print('base after x->p:', repr(c.base_set.subs(x, p)))
    print('result:', repr(c.subs(x, p)))
k = Symbol('k')
img1 = imageset(Lambda(k, 2*k*pi + asin(y)), S.Integers)
img2 = imageset(Lambda(k, 2*k*pi + asin(S.One/3)), S.Integers)
c = ConditionSet(x, Contains(y, Interval(-1,1)), img1)
r = c.subs(y, S.One/3)
print('image input:', repr(c))
print('image post-cond:', repr(c.condition.subs(y, S.One/3)))
print('image post-base:', repr(c.base_set.subs(y, S.One/3)))
print('image result:', repr(r))
print('expected:', repr(img2), 'dummy_eq:', r.dummy_eq(img2))
PY"
